requirements.description: All public traffic must enter the system via Cloudflare CDN with no direct origin IP exposure.
requirements.threshold: Cloudflare CDN is the only public entry point; No direct client access to the origin IP is permitted.
requirements.measurement_method: Network ingress inspection and origin IP exposure verification.

requirements.description: All uploaded assets must be scanned for malware before processing.
requirements.threshold: Malware scanning enabled via ClamAV for all incoming file uploads.
requirements.measurement_method: File processing log audit and malware scanner status check.

requirements.description: Multi-tenant data isolation enforced at database level to prevent cross-tenant data leakage.
requirements.threshold: Row-Level Security (RLS) prevents any SQL query on tenant A from retrieving tenant B data with 100% isolation success rate.
requirements.measurement_method: Database security policy review and query isolation testing using automated harness.

requirements.description: Mobile applications must function without active network connectivity with full offline support.
requirements.threshold: Mobile clients supporting offline-first capabilities with zero data loss during disconnection.
requirements.measurement_method: Network disconnection simulation test on mobile build.

requirements.description: Multi-step workflows must maintain state consistency and allow retrying without side effects.
requirements.threshold: Ensures idempotency and monotonic state transitions for all multi-step processes.
requirements.measurement_method: Replay test of workflow execution and state log consistency verification.

requirements.description: Property data and governance history must persist despite tenant changes over time.
requirements.threshold: Property data and governance history must remain persistent and isolated across tenant lifecycle.
requirements.measurement_method: Long-term data retention audit and tenant change isolation test.

requirements.description: System telemetry must be collected and aggregated via a designated OTel collector.
requirements.threshold: Observability services implemented via OpenTelementry with 100% critical stack trace capture.
requirements.measurement_method: OTel pipeline connectivity and log integrity verification.

requirements.description: Interactive API latency must remain low for user-facing endpoints.
requirements.threshold: p95 API response time must not exceed 200 milliseconds.
requirements.measurement_method: Server-side timing histogram; Prometheus-style SLO burn-rate alerts.

requirements.description: All sensitive data at rest must be encrypted using industry standard algorithms.
requirements.threshold: data at rest must be encrypted using AES-256 standard.
requirements.measurement_method: Ciphertext verification and KMS key audit.

requirements.description: Active session tokens must expire automatically after a defined period of inactivity.
requirements.threshold: Session tokens must expire automatically after 15 minutes of inactivity.
requirements.measurement_method: Session refresh tracking and timeout event log analysis.

requirements.description: All external API communications must use the latest secure transport protocol.
requirements.threshold: all external API calls must use TLS 1.3 or higher encryption.
requirements.measurement_method: TLS handshake inspection and certificate chain verification.

requirements.description: Payment gateway must maintain compliance with global financial security standards.
requirements.threshold: Payment gateway must maintain PCI-DSS Level 1 certification status.
requirements.measurement_method: Vendor attestation and periodic PCI audit review.

requirements.description: Audit logs must be immutable to prevent tampering or deletion of state change records.
requirements.threshold: audit logs must be immutable and append-only with no write access controls.
requirements.measurement_method: Write audit log integrity check and access control verification.

requirements.description: System backups must occur frequently to ensure recoverability after disaster events.
requirements.threshold: Backup frequency must occur at least once every 6 hours.
requirements.measurement_method: Backup completion job monitoring and log verification.

requirements.description: Recovery time objective (RTO) must be met to minimize downtime.
requirements.threshold: recovery time objective (RTO) must be under 4 hours after disaster event.
requirements.measurement_method: Disaster recovery simulation test.

requirements.description: Recovery point objective (RPO) must be met to minimize data loss.
requirements.threshold: recovery point objective (RPO) must be under 5 minutes for critical ledgers.
requirements.measurement_method: Last backup timestamp vs failure point verification.

requirements.description: Data subject access requests (DSAR) must be processed within regulatory timelines.
requirements.threshold: GDPR data subject access request response must be initiated within 72 hours.
requirements.measurement_method: DSAR intake timestamp to response initiation timestamp measurement.

requirements.description: User credentials must be hashed and salted before storage to prevent reverse engineering.
requirements.threshold: all user passwords must be salted and hashed using bcrypt algorithm.
requirements.measurement_method: Database schema inspection for password hash format verification.

requirements.description: API ingestion must be rate-limited to protect against abuse.
requirements.threshold: rate limiting must allow max 100 requests per minute per user ID.
requirements.measurement_method: Inbound request rate log analysis.

requirements.description: Cross-origin requests must be restricted to approved domains only.
requirements.threshold: cross-origin resource sharing (CORS) policy must strictly whitelist approved domains.
requirements.measurement_method: CORS header configuration review and test.

requirements.description: Sensitive financial records must be retained for the legally required duration.
requirements.threshold: data retention for sensitive financial records must be exactly 7 years.
requirements.measurement_method: Data archival policy review and retention tag audit.

requirements.description: Role-based access control must enforce least privilege for all users.
requirements.threshold: RBAC permissions must enforce least privilege principle for all user roles.
requirements.measurement_method: Policy engine audit and permission set review.

requirements.description: All login forms must be protected against cross-site request forgery attacks.
requirements.threshold: cross-site request forgery (CSRF) protection must be enabled on all login forms.
requirements.measurement_method: Form input inspection for CSRF token validation.

requirements.description: Schema migrations must ensure service continuity during updates.
requirements.threshold: database schema migrations must not cause downtime during major versions.
requirements.measurement_method: Migration deployment log analysis for downtime measurement.

requirements.description: The system ledger structure must be auditable and compliant with accounting standards.
requirements.threshold: Auditable, compliant GL structure with cryptographic integrity hashes.
requirements.measurement_method: GL entry audit and hash verification.

requirements.description: Statutory notices and meeting agendas must be issued and logged within regulatory deadlines.
requirements.threshold: Statutory deadlines, notice requirements, and voting rules must be respected.
requirements.measurement_method: Notice issuance timestamp vs. statutory deadline verification.

requirements.description: Vendor partners must maintain valid certifications and insurance coverage.
requirements.threshold: State/county licensing, Trade certifications, Insurance and bonding compliance monitoring.
requirements.measurement_method: Vendor profile review for valid document status.

requirements.description: System tax calculations must align with jurisdictional configuration.
requirements.threshold: Ledger Entry includes correct tax amount based on Tax Jurisdiction config.
requirements.measurement_method: Ledger tax amount vs. Jurisdiction config verification.
